meta.title: Confronting a New Era of Global Threats: A Conversation with US Senator John Cornyn
meta.description:
Join Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Tim Morrison and U.S. Senator John Cornyn (R-TX) for a discussion on the future of nuclear arms control, competing with China’s semiconductor industry, and the rapidly evolving global threat landscape.

From outdated nuclear treaties to not-so-secret plans for Chinese tech domination, today’s global security threats are more complex than ever before. How can the U.S. maintain its competitive edge in this environment? Please join us for this timely discussion.
